model_alias_note: workflow agent() aliases haiku/sonnet/opus map to the registry IDs above (session harness 2026-07-11); a mid-run CLI/model change = abort per 1.3
reader_effort_note: OWNER PIN 2026-07-11: effort=high on ALL reader arms; adopted tier = (model, effort) pair; identical effort across arms for fair model comparison
grading_plan: strict 1.5 batching: <=10 UNRELATED judgment items per call (Fable ruling 2026-07-11: closest to production per-case judging; per-chunk list grading rejected for anchoring + correlated-error risk)

caps.authorized_by: owner 2026-07-11 (raised 1800->1900 after two declared incidents: prefix-cache re-run +80; 8-chunk args error +24 corrective)

para8k_projection.method: ADOPTED operationalization: production splitter ladder (split_event) + production greedy packing applied to the 40 KEY CHUNKS content (byte-conserving, 1,224,178 chars), packing scoped per parent key chunk
para8k_projection.rejected_alternative: full-source-event rechunk = 525 chunks / 2,458 projected calls: breaches the owner abort (2,200) AND confounds para-vs-40k recall with 3.1x never-gold text (fixture events are parts of source events)
para8k_projection.estimate_basis_superseded: pre-run arithmetic estimate 163 (ceil per chunk) superseded by exact packing count 183

pit.note: readers see frozen fixture chunk content only; no gold, no sidecar, no key (K-reader protocol section 3 blindness)

best_cheap_rule: the cheaper of {Haiku, Sonnet} whose A1/A2 judged recall >= max(A1,A2,A3) - 2 pts; none qualifies -> Sonnet

incidents.validity: none (identical prompts, pre-scoring; operative A2/A3 = second generation, declared)
none (pinned 8 get fresh blind reads; off-sample quarantined; no grading had run)
